description: Report about the inspection of a house in Minyat Zifta to assess the rent from a pious foundation. Dated: first decade of Tammuz 1489 Seleucid = first decade of Muḥarram 574 AH = June 1178 CE. (Information from Mediterranean Society, IV, p. 373, and from Goitein's index cards.) There is undeciphered text in Arabic script on verso, maybe a filing note.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
